history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A blurred image background with a centered translucent dark pill-shaped overlay containing a download icon and the text “1,1 MB”.

The main visual focus is the semi-transparent rounded rectangle overlay in the center, with a white downward arrow icon on the left and the number “1,1 MB” in large white text across the middle.

The setting appears to be an out-of-focus background showing indistinct figures and colorful shapes, but no clear indoor or outdoor environment is visible, and the time of day and weather are unclear.

The overlay is dark greenish-gray with a soft glow around it, and the background is heavily blurred with warm and bright tones including yellows, oranges, and reds.

Visible Text:
1,1 MB

Practical Summary:
The image shows a download-style status overlay over a blurred, colorful background. It indicates a file size reading “1,1 MB” next to a downward arrow icon.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

Gambar ini menampilkan sebuah tombol oval dengan latar belakang buram berwarna oranye dan kuning. Di dalam tombol tersebut, terdapat ikon unduh berwarna putih dan teks "1,1 MB" yang juga berwarna putih. Teks tersebut menunjukkan ukuran file sebesar 1,1 megabyte. Latar belakang gambar buram tidak menampilkan objek yang jelas, namun terlihat seperti ada siluet atau bentuk yang menyerupai karakter atau objek yang terang.

nsfw: false, confidence: 0, label: safe
